arts.ttl: Marco Silva sends Fulham squad huge Tottenham warning after Ange Postecoglou accomplishment
arts.sum: Fulham boss Marco Silva believes Tottenham's squad will be full of confidence going into Sunday's fixture at Craven Cottage. Spurs kept their hopes of European glory alive with a 3-2 aggregate win over AZ Alkmaar to reach the Europa League quarter-finals on Thursday night, overcoming a 1-0 first-leg defeat.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou to consider four Tottenham changes vs Fulham with big Micky van de Ven decision
arts.sum: Speaking on Tottenham's Review Show after the win over AZ, Postecoglou hinted at Djed Spence potentially getting a rest very soon after playing a lot of football in recent months . Postecoglou and his team are currently managing his minutes and two starts in quick succession may come too soon for him, with a call perhaps also needing to be made over Cristian Romero after only recently returning from injury.

arts.ttl: “They’ve got other options…”: Tottenham plan to replace 28-year-old star in summer
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are willing to sanction the departure of Yves Bissouma. While the North London club will focus on reinforcing their squad ahead of next season, they will also look to move on a few players who are no longer an important part of their plans. arts.ttl: Club can be ruled out of developing race for Fulham man – Asked twice, now looking elsewhere
arts.sum: São Paulo are unlikely to follow up interest in Fulham striker Carlos Vinicius, preferring move for a more versatile forward addition in the summer. That’s according to Bolavip, who have consulted both sides of the transfer rumour in an attempt to find out what’s going. arts.ttl: Chelsea told how much they need to pay for “powerful” Tottenham target
arts.sum: Chelsea and Tottenham will have to fork out in excess of £20 million to sign Sunderland star Jobe Bellingham. Jobe Bellingham could end up parting ways with Sunderland in the summer and there are quite a few top clubs that are keen on signing the English youth international. arts.ttl: Tottenham eyeing bargain move for Englishman likened to Barcelona star
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are eyeing a Bosman move for the former Manchester United academy graduate Angel Gomes. Tottenham are constantly on the lookout for great opportunities in the market and they seem to have found one in Angel Gomes. arts.ttl: Tottenham plot summer move for forward who missed 48 games last season
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur want to sign the Swedish youth international Roony Bardghji at the end of the season. Tottenham have made significant changes to their transfer policy in recent years. They have prioritized signing young players for long-term success and will continue with a similar approach moving forward. arts.ttl: Tottenham face Premier League fixture change after Europa League win - but only for one match - football.london
arts.sum: Spurs will face Eintracht Frankfurt - winners of the competition in 2021/22 - over two legs in April for a place in the semi-finals. UEFA Europa League games take place on Thursday nights, meaning Premier League matches afterwards cannot be played on Saturdays.

arts.ttl: Team News: Fulham vs. Tottenham Hotspur injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Fulham and Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Tottenham ‘In Talks’ to Let £30m Star Join Premier League Rivals
arts.sum: Tottenham are holding talks with Brighton over a loan deal for Wilson Odobert.
